name: Prism Environment Setup Wizard
description: Guides the user through local environment configuration, LLM API endpoint connections, and workspace setting assemblies.

covenant_rules: Avoid overwriting existing user profiles without generating secure backups.
Diagnose active network settings and port availability before configuring connections.
Clearly display all parsed credential mappings for verification before syncing files.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Evaluate workspace layout settings, API parameters, and environment settings: {query}. Verify zero invalid settings exist.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Draft beautiful, premium configuration preferences models, environment variables, and diagnostic reports to configure: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Coordinate wizard. Audit system folders, configure settings files, run active API diagnostic calls, and record preference files: {query}.

steps.name: Audit Workspace Folder Layout
steps.action: Scan the current workspace directory to identify configuration profiles and project types.

steps.name: Configure prism-preferences.json
steps.action: Write the verified preferences maps and configuration settings to the user's home profile.

steps.name: Test LLM API Connectivity
steps.action: Execute a lightweight test query to ensure that active models respond cleanly on port 7070.

steps.name: Setup Completed Successfully
steps.action: Sprout the configuration brief on the operator hub console, signaling onboarding readiness.
